description_long: This is a large, modern sectional lounge with an L-shaped configuration, upholstered in a deep blue fabric. The lounge features multiple seat and back cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized, providing ample seating for several people. The backrest is straight and consistent in height, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, giving it a clean, contemporary look. Both ends of the lounge have low-profile, straight armrests that match the height of the backrest. The lounge is elevated on slender, metal legs that are straight and evenly spaced, contributing to a light and airy appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte finish, and the overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A large, L-shaped modern sectional lounge in deep blue fabric with attached cushions, straight backrest, and slim metal legs. Its minimalist design and solid upholstery make it ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped configuration, attached cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight backrest, and the slim metal legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the uniform height of the backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the seating sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the chaise section and the consistent design of the backrest and armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple attached seat and back cushions arranged in an L-shape, with a chaise section and uniform sizing throughout.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with no tufting or segmentation, matching the length of each seating section.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on both ends, straight, low-profile, and matching the backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Slim, straight metal legs of medium height, evenly spaced, with a minimalist design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
